zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Hunter於1548年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親John Hunter (3) ...30歲，母親Elizabeth Webbe23歲。她於1563年與George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1583年10月23日在英國肯特米爾頓享年35歲，埋葬在英國肯特米爾頓 格拉福森德。

nameMeanings.name: Hunter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: occupational name from Middle English hunter(e) ‘huntsman’ (see Hunt ).
Irish (Antrim and Derry): adopted for Gaelic Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) due to confusion with the word fiadhach ‘hunt’.
History: A Scottish family of this name (see 1 above) has been established at Hunterston (Ayrshire) since the 13th century.

variants.name: Hunt
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle English hunte ‘hunter, huntsman’ (Old English hunta). The term was used not only of the hunting on horseback of game such as stags and wild boars, which in the Middle Ages was a pursuit restricted to the ranks of the nobility, but also to much humbler forms of pursuit such as bird catching and poaching for food. The word seems also to have been used as an Old English personal name and to have survived into the Middle Ages as an occasional personal name. Compare Huntington and Huntley .
Irish: adopted for various Irish surnames containing or thought to contain the Gaelic element fiadhach ‘hunt’; for example Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) and Ó Fiachna (see Fenton ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Hundt  .

variants.name: Huntress
meanings: Scottish: apparently from the feminine form of   Hunter  .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Hunter was born in 1548, in Devon, England, her father, John Hunter (3) ..., was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Webbe, was 23. She married George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend in 1563, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 23 October 1583, in Milton, Kent, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Milton Gravesend, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Hunter est née en 1548, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Hunter (3) ..., avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Webbe, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend en 1563, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1583, à Milton, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Milton Gravesend, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Hunter 1548 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hunter (3) ... 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Webbe 23. Sie hat 1563 in Kent, England George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Oktober 1583 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Milton, Kent, England und wurde in Milton Gravesend, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Hunter è nata il nel 1548 nel Devon, England, sua padre, John Hunter (3) ..., aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Webbe, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend nel 1563, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 23 ottobre 1583, nel Milton, Kent, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Milton Gravesend, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Hunterが1548年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Hunter (3) ...は30歳，母Elizabeth Webbeは23歳であった。1563年にイギリスケントでGeorge Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesendと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1583年10月23日にイギリスケントミルトンで35歳で死去し，イギリスケントミルトン グラベセンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Hunter(이)가 1548년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hunter (3) ...(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Webbe(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1563년 영국 켄트에서 George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 10월 23일 영국 켄트 미턴에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 미턴 그레이베센드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Hunter nasceu em 1548, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hunter (3) ..., tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Webbe, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend em 1563, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1583, em Milton, Kent, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Milton Gravesend, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.St Dunstan in the West, London, England: ст дунстань ин т вест, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Hunter родилась в 1548 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hunter (3) .. было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Webbe, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend в 1563 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 23 октября 1583 г. в местности милтон, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности милтон гравесенд, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con George Tucker, of Throwleigh and Gravesend en 1563, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1583, en Milton, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Milton Gravesend, Kent, Inglaterra.
